alt: Spectacular high-res shot of Moorish idol swimming in Anilao reefs
caption: The Moorish idol is an iconic, breathtakingly beautiful coral reef fish known for its bold stripes and long trailing dorsal pennant.
attributionText: Photo by Diego Delso via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0
attributionHtml: Photo by Diego Delso via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0
acquisitionNotes: High-resolution moorish idol hero image showcasing its distinctive trailing pennant. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/7/71/%C3%8Ddolo_moro_%28Zanclus_cornutus%29%2C_Anilao%2C_Filipinas%2C_2023-08-25%2C_DD_233.jpg
